name.ja: <ruby>道化の一座<rt>クラウン・クラン</rt></ruby> ドリッシュ

text.en:
2 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, and/or Pendulum Monsters
Your Tribute Summoned monsters can make a second attack during each Battle Phase. If this card is Tributed: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Clown Clan Drish" once per turn);
● Return all Link Monsters on the field and in the GYs to the Extra Deck.
● Each player shuffles their entire hand into the Deck, then they draw the same number of cards they shuffled.

materials: 2 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, and/or Pendulum Monsters
